channel.title: Desktop on OONI: Open Observatory of Network Interference
channel.description: Recent content in Desktop on OONI: Open Observatory of Network Interference

item.title: Launch: New OONI Probe Desktop App for Windows and macOS
item.description:
If you’re a user of the OONI Probe desktop application, you might have felt it was lacking a bit of love. It works fine, but it was lacking some features and UI improvements already available on its mobile counterpart. Well we’ve got good news, a new version of the OONI Probe desktop app is now available for Windows and macOS. And you can expect more frequent updates going forward.

Get the new OONI Probe Desktop App.
